Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise (4) hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Dawn Hassell, Esq. for Petitioner: Winton C. Joseph, present as Guardian ad litem for: Winston Joseph III; Jayzal Joseph; Juandelle Joseph and Juan Joseph, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved.
-as to Winston Joseph III, Attorney's Fees $1,562.50, Costs $494.70, net balance of $4,192.80.
-as to Jayzal Joseph, Attorney's Fees $1,562.50, Costs $383.01, Medical Expenses $266.64, net balance of $4,037.85.
-as to Juandelle Joseph, Attorney's Fees $1,562.50, Costs $368.98, Medical Expenses $582.88, net balance of $3,735.64.
-as to Juan Joseph, Attorney's Fees $1,562.50, Costs $348.69, net balance of $4,338.81.
All net balance for each minor to be deposited into a blocked account with Sterling Bank & Trust, 6555 San Bruno Ave., San Francisco, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
